event.title: Robot Vacuum Wins Local Talent Show
event.description: A robot vacuum entered a small-town talent show and 'performed' by bumping into furniture in rhythm, delighting the crowd.

angle: Arbi is convinced the vacuum stole HIS spotlight and demands a rematch.
line: Arbi shoves a tiny robot vacuum aside, grabs a mic, and belts a dramatic solo while spinning in a victory circle.

visual_direction.scene: Arbi crashes a talent-show stage, snatches the mic from a robot vacuum, and performs.
visual_direction.outfit: Sparkly silver stage jacket with oversized sequined bowtie
